text:
Jack loves to kayak. One sunny Saturday morning, curious Jack decides to kayak down the slow-flowing creek behind his cottage. As he paddles peacefully, an otter floats by. Jack smiles; perhaps this visit will make his favorite stories come true.

Soon after, an improbable thing happens. A huge turtle floats lazily beside Jack. Its scales shimmer dark against the sunlight. Jack stops paddling and watches.

That’s just my lucky day.

With surprising agility, the turtle lands atop Jack’s head. Laughing heartily, Jack thinks maybe he ought to learn to swim. After several peaceful swims upstream, our little otter friend flies away.

Jack dreams nightly of grand adventures. Now he has one.

Days pass. Strange things start happening. Doors open inexplicably; Jack hears soft laughter. That’s otter.

Sometimes he dreams they live there. Sometimes they’re fighting over an old log.

Then one afternoon, while tossing a stick into the water, Jack notices something silvery
